Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Don't sleep on the summer panfish bite! The lion's share of panfishing occurs during the springtime when the fish are concentrated in the shallow waters and also in the winter, but summertime can be absolutely fantastic for bluegill and crappie. Just like other gamefish, they can make dramatic seasonal movements and you'll need to find them first before you can catch them. Today, we're joined by panfish aficionado Joel Nelson.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Fishing for Summertime Bluegill and Crappie
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The gang from Sport Fishing TV chase big fish feeding on mullet swarms.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Breaking the Law
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Breaking the Law
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The crew heads to Trinidad to fish for "Big Silver."
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe Camera Crew Madness
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - Camera Crew Madness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hook Line and Snook
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Hook Line and Snook
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: One of the best parts of traveling is the pleasant surprises that come along every trip. In last week's episode, Shea McIntee and the crew had a remarkable day of Marlin fishing in Madalena Bay. Now we find out Madalena Bay doesn't only have fantastic offshore fishing, it also has inshore fishing that is out of this world. Shea's captain takes us to some of his favorite spots to catch Red Snapper, Snook, Corbina, and a fish we have never seen before, Palometa.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - The Magdalena Bay Experience, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest FLW Pro Cody Meyer are on Clear Lake battling the rocks for the bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe South Georgia Showdown_rd
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Groupers To Go
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Groupers to Go
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jeremy Smith break out the bass gear for an early-summer run on a Midwestern natural lake and find epic bites in shallow-water junk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge - Junk Fishin' Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bass Fishing Legend, Denny Brauer accompanies Kim on Lake Amistad. The bass have been migrated shallow, however the influence of a passing cold front presents a challenge as the two seasoned anglers pitch the bushes with a Rage Bug.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Operation Fishing Freedom heads south to the Gulf Of Mexico with Vietnam Army Medic John Hitchens in search of a shark. He shares his story of being a medic during the Vietnam War to becoming part of a sober bike club.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Medic John Hitchens
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Grandpa's Back Yard
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Grandpa's Back Yard
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Early spring bassin’ in Southern Utah
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This weeks episode we do somethingi've never done before. we ice fish lake trout but we can see about 30 feet down through the clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Giant Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry shows us how to get those wily walleyes on the hook.
Video.title: Up North Walleyes

Video.summary: Larry shows us how to get those wily walleyes on the hook.
Video.title: Up North Walleyes

Video.summary: A few years back, three guys went fishing, but that just wasn't any day of fishing. Just when you least expected it, Matt Newman caught his personal best-spotted bass, and a few minutes later, Paul Bailey caught the World Record Spotted Bass that weighed 11.5 on four different scales. The nation went bonkers. Today those three same guys are going fishing again at one of the world's best bass fishing lakes. Welcome to Clear Lake!
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — World Record Bass at Clear Lake Reunion

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — World Record Bass at Clear Lake Reunion
Stoked on Fishing — World Record Bass at Clear Lake Reunion
Stoked on Fishing — World Record Bass at Clear Lake Reunion

Video.summary: Over the last few weeks, Shea McIntee and the crew have been hanging out in Gustavus, Alaska, the southern gateway to Glacier Bay National Park. Mother Nature has blessed us with lovely weather that has allowed us to observe its incredible surroundings, animals, and whales. Halibut fishing has been off the charts, especially using jigs in shallow water. Today, we saved the best for last and get into one big halibut after another. Stoked on Alaska. Here we go!
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Video.summary: Over the last few weeks, Shea McIntee and the crew have been hanging out in Gustavus, Alaska, the southern gateway to Glacier Bay National Park. Mother Nature has blessed us with lovely weather that has allowed us to observe its incredible surroundings, animals, and whales. Halibut fishing has been off the charts, especially using jigs in shallow water. Today, we saved the best for last and get into one big halibut after another. Stoked on Alaska. Here we go!
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains the lures and locations to best catch post-spawn bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Finding Bass on a river can mean covering miles of water
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin uses cool new bait to help catch finicky bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | New Spin on Finesse
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with the most celebrated mind in Bass Fishing, Drew Gill. In depth conversation about his forward-facing sonar set up and strategy.
Video.title: Episode 1
